# Schedule

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Note!
The program below is tentative and may be updated.
:::

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
source("../R/schedule.R")
render_program_schedule(
  program_csv = "../data/program.csv",
  sessions_csv = "../data/sessions.csv"
)
```
